ai_role: AI GPU platform, accelerator systems, CUDA, and AI networking
tvs_tiebreaker: High TVS and high chokepoint durability can support core status, but valuation and capex sensitivity should gate new adds.
technical_timing_rule: For core ownership, technicals guide add pacing; avoid chasing EXTENDED setups.
rationale: NVIDIA controls the dominant AI accelerator platform through GPUs, CUDA, systems, and networking. Risk is less about current moat quality and more about valuation, hyperscaler capex digestion, and long-run custom ASIC substitution.
